address.full: Problem Solver Tech, near Ram Mandir, Kabit Khedi, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452010

reviews.author: Rajesh Verma
reviews.text: Called PS Tech for a major pipe burst at 10 PM and they arrived within 90 minutes. Excellent emergency service. Fixed everything neatly with no mess left behind. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Priya Sharma
reviews.text: Got my geyser repaired and a new tap installed the same day. The technician was polite, wore shoe covers, and explained what was wrong clearly. Transparent pricing — no hidden charges.

reviews.author: Anil Patidar
reviews.text: PS Tech did the complete interior plumbing for my new flat in Vijay Nagar. Very professional team. On time, clean work. Will definitely hire again for any home service.

reviews.author: Sunita Joshi
reviews.text: Had a stubborn drain clog that two other plumbers couldn't fix. PS Tech solved it in under an hour and also checked all other drains for free. Great attitude and expertise.

reviews.author: Mahesh Dubey
reviews.text: Booked them for a sump pump installation before monsoon. They advised the right pump size for my basement and completed the job cleanly. Very satisfied with the monsoon-readiness now.
